message:
bd-zfxio: canonicalization pipeline integration for CrashPack

Add CrashPackBuilder::from_trace() that wires the existing Foata
canonicalization pipeline (canonicalize() + trace_fingerprint()) into
crash pack construction. Two equivalent schedules — differing only by
commutations of independent events — now produce identical fingerprints
and canonical prefixes, making crash packs stable repro artifacts.

7 integration tests covering: field population, equivalence across
swapped independent events, non-equivalence of different causal
structures, Foata layer fidelity, empty traces, all 6 permutations
of 3 independent events, and diamond dependency patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
